queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of checking account balances between 0 and 200 DM as a determinant of default and a credit risk driver increasing loan default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation of savings account balances below 100 DM as a mitigating factor that reduces credit default probability and inversely influences credit risk drivers.
